subcodes.first_line: O Dhabíh! Thou wert created for the propagation of the Faith. In this Day silence and stillness beseemeth not such as thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ذبیح از برای تبلیغ خلق شدی قعود و صمت جایز نه الیوم بر امثال آنجناب لازم
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @methods of teaching the Cause, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @detachment in teaching the Cause, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
